64671.「今度こそ 逃がすかっ！: You won't get away this time!

64677.「あ <pc>さんっ。\n 今の…… 見てたでしょう？:
<pc>! You saw what happened
just now, right...?

64678.「バッファロンの怨霊は ああやって\n 毎日のように現れて 人を襲ってるの。\n:
Every day that spirit appears to attack
us... There's just no end to everyone
getting sick...

64679.「きっと あの怨霊を 鎮めない限り\n アラハギーロは 救えないと思う……。\n:
Unless that spirit is calmed, then all of
Al-Ahagiro is in trouble... That's why I want
to know its true identity.

64680.「ねえ <pc>さん！\n 私たちが 格闘場の地下のオリから\n 逃がした魔物た:
Say, do you remember those monsters we
let escape from their cage underneath the
arena?

64681.「あの魔物たちは もともと人間なんだから\n バッファロンの怨霊について\n 何:
Since those monsters used to be human, then
they might just know something about that
spirit.

64682.「だから <pc>さん！\n あの魔物たちを探すの 手伝ってくれない？: Will you help me find those monsters?

64683.「ホント！？ ありがとう！\n <pc>さんが一緒なら 心強いわ。:
You will?! Thanks!
I'm always relieved when you're with me.

64684.「町の外へ よく出かける人なら\n 魔物たちについて 何か 知ってるかも！\n:
If there's anyone in town who comes and goes
often, then they might know something about
those monsters! Try asking around!

64685.「ホント！？ あっ でも……\n <pc>さん 他の人からの頼まれごとも\n い:
You will?! Oh, but...it looks like you've got
your hands full helping others right now.

64686.「私 この先の武器庫で 調べものしてるから\n 用事が終わったら 来てくれる？:
I'll be doing some more research in the armory
up ahead. When you're finished with your
business, come and find me, okay?

64687.「そっか……。<pc>さんしか\n お願いできる人 いないんだけどな……。:
I see...
But you're the only person I can ask...

64688.「私 この先の武器庫で 調べものしてるから\n もし 気が変わったら 来てね。:
I'll be doing some more research in the armory
up ahead. Come and find me if you change
your mind, okay?

64690.「バッファロンの怨霊は あなたも見た通り\n 毎日のように現れて 人を襲ってるの:
That Buffalogre spirit appears every day to
attack us. People are just gonna keep getting
sick...

64691.「きっと あの怨霊を 鎮めない限り\n アラハギーロは 救えないと思う……。\n:
Unless that spirit is calmed, then all of
Al-Ahagiro is in trouble... That's why I want
to know its true identity.

64692.「私たちが 格闘場の地下のオリから 逃がした\n 元人間の魔物なら あの怨霊につ:
I think those monsters that we let escape from
the arena would probably know something
about that spirit.

64693.「だから <pc>さん！\n あの魔物たちを探すの 手伝ってくれない？: Will you help me find those monsters?

64694.「そっか……。<pc>さんしか\n お願いできる人 いないんだけどな……。:
I see...
But you're the only person I can ask...

64695.「私 ここで 調べものしてるから\n もし 気が変わったら 来てね。:
I'll be here doing some research, so come back
if you change your mind, okay?

64696.「……ねえ おじさん。今の ホント！？\n 格闘場から逃げた 魔物たちは\n 今:
Is that really true what you said, mister?
The monsters that escaped from the arena
are now in the Sunshade Cave?

64697.「んぁ？ ああ……。\n って言っても それっぽい魔物の集団ってだけで\n 確か:
What's that? Ah... Well, they certainly looked
like escaped monsters to me. Not entirely
sure, though.

64699.「<pc>さん。これは 有力な情報を\n 得たみたいだね！ とりあえず\n 日除:
Looks like we got a good lead, <pc>!
Let's go and take a look at what's
going on in the Sunshade Cave!

64700.「日除けのほら穴は アラハギーロ王国の\n 南にあるの。\n 私は 先に向かって:
The cave is south from outside town.
I'll go on ahead!

64701.「<pc>さん 来てくれたのね。\n 格闘場から 逃がした子たち いるかなぁ？:
Good, you're here. I wonder if those monsters
are in here?

64703.「みんな ひさしぶりだね！\n 前 ベルムドさんに 襲われたときは\n 助けてく:
Hey, you guys! It's been awhile.
Thanks so much for helping me the
last time Bermud attacked me!

64704.「あのねっ。今日は あなたたちに\n 聞きたいことがあって 来たの！:
Um, well... The reason I came here is because
I wanted to ask you all something!

64705.「今 アラハギーロの城下町に\n バッファロンの怨霊が 現れて\n 町の人たちを:
There's this vengeful Buffalogre spirit
that's appeared in town, and it's terrorizing
everyone...

64706.「たぶん 格闘場のショーで ベルムドさんに\n 最初に殺されてしまった バッファ:
It's probably the same Buffalogre that Bermud
defeated first in the arena. Do you guys
happen to know who they were...?

64709.「ベルムドに 最初に殺されたバッファロンなら\n ゴリウス兵士長に 間違いありま:
If that Buffalogre was the first monster that
Bermud killed, then it's without a doubt
Captain Gorius.

64710.「あ あなたは……？\n 人間の言葉が 話せるのね？: You... You can speak in human language?

64711.「はい……。申し遅れました。\n 私は アラハギーロ兵士団の 兵士長だった\n:
I can... Forgive me for not introducing myself
sooner. My name is Tajius, Gorius's son. He
was the captain of Al-Ahagiro's soldiers.

64712.「格闘場から 逃してくださったことには\n みな 感謝しています。\n あなたが:
We are all very grateful that you helped us to
escape the arena. If you hadn't, our lives
would've been cut short...

64713.「ううん。私 あなたたちが キズつけられるのを\n 見ていられなかっただけだから:
It was nothing. I just couldn't bear to see
any of you get hurt.

64714.「それより そのゴリウスさんって たしか\n ベルムドさんに きつく 命令してた:
Anyways...Gorius was the one who was really
strict with Bermud, right? Can you tell me
more about him?

64715.「父は 非常に プライドの高い人でしたから\n ベルムドに 見せ物にされ 殺され:
My father was quite the prideful man. Being turned into a spectacle and then killed by Bermud...his resentment must truly be
something extraordinary.

64716.「元はと言えば 父が まもの使いたちの魔物を\n 戦地へ向かわせ 人間たちの盾に:
After all, my father started this whole thing.
Sending those monsters into battle as human
shields... All that hatred was born from that.

64717.「セラフィさん！\n 申し訳ありませんが 私をアラハギーロまで\n 連れていって:
Seraphi! Apologies for asking, but do you
think you could take me to Al-Ahagiro?

64718.「私が 父を説得してみます！\n 父には 自らの過ちを認め 恨みを捨てて\n 天:
Allow me to try and convince him the error of his ways! I want to see him admit his wrongdoing, quell his hatred, and pass on
peacefully...

64719.「そっか……。\n タジウスさん ありがとう！: I see... Thanks for telling me!

64720.「<pc>さん。思いがけず\n 心強い味方が現れて よかったね。:
How lucky for us that we found such a
dependable ally, huh?

64721.「もしかしたら タジウスさんがいれば\n 問題が 解決するかも。城下町へ戻って\:
If Tajius is with us, then maybe we can
finally put a stop to this. Let's go back to
town and find Gorius!

64727.「……僕が わからないのですか？\n あなたの息子の タジウスです！！:
Do you not recognize me?
It's me, Tajius! Your son!

64728.「いくら探したって ベルムドは\n もう いないんです！\n どうか 怒りを鎮め:
Bermud is goneーthere's no longer any reason
to look for him! Please, you must quell your
anger!

64729.「……僕は 人を恨んで 我を忘れ 暴れくるう\n そんな父さんの姿は 見たくあり:
I don't want to see you like this!
You've lost your mind and you're out of
control!

64730.「ヒョーッヒョッヒョ！\n そんな安っぽい 親子のメロドラマで\n 私の実験の:
Nyeh nyeh nyeh! How dare you interrupt my
experiment with that cheesy father-son talk?

64731.「……おや。そこにいるのは あの勇者姫の\n 横にいた…… たしか <pc>。\:
Oh? You were the one who was with the Hero
Princess...<pc>, was it?
How nice to see you again.

64732.「せっかく こうして再会できたのですから \n あれから 私の身に起こったことを:
Since we have this special chance of seeing
each other once again, I suppose I should tell
you just what I've been up to since then.

64733.「あなたがたに 我が研究の集大成である\n 魔勇者を粉砕され 私のプライドは\n:
My pride was utterly shattered when you
destroyed the culmination of my research...
My Evil Hero.

64734.「ですが おかげで 目が覚めましたよ……。\n あの程度の成果に 満足していたな:
But because of that, my eyes were opened...to
think I was satisfied with such meager
results. How embarrassing!

64735.「かくして 私は より強い素材を求め\n 偽のレンダーシア中を 探索したのです。:
So I scoured the false Lendersia in search of
more capable test subjects. That's when I
finally discovered him...

64737.「彼がまとう 怨念のチカラは 計り知れません。\n このチカラと 私の技術が合わ:
His resentment holds a power immeasurable.
With his power and my ability, it will truly
be the greatest masterpiece of my research!

64738.「そして この国を滅ぼすことで それを証明し\n 大魔王マデサゴーラ様に\n 我:
And I'll prove it by destroying this country!
The pinnacle of my research shall be an
offering to the great Madesagora!

64739.「<pc>。あなたを倒せば ゴリウス君の \n 優秀さは 確かなものとなるはず…:
If I defeat you, <pc>...then that's
proof enough of Gorius' excellence. Come!
You will be another test subject for me!

64741.「ヒョヒョッ？ まだ 人の情が残っているとは\n 計算外です。そんな 生ぬるい感:
What's this? I suppose I didn't account for
your lingering human emotions. It seems
some adjustments are in order...

64742.「それでは <pc>！\n 再調整ののち また お会いしましょう。\n 次こそ:
Let us meet again after I've turned those
emotions into even MORE resentment. Next
time, I will certainly tear you to shreds!

64744.「オマエたち 何者だ！？\n あの怨霊と 話していたようだが\n 何か 関係があ:
Just who are you people?! You were talking to
that spirit like you knew who it was...

64745.「もしや ヤツを 町に引き込んでいるのは\n オマエたちじゃないのか！？\n 怪:
Are you the ones who have been luring it
here?! You're awfully suspicious... Come with
me!

64748.「安心しろ。今の声は オレの仲間さ。:
Don't worry. That voice you just heard was a
friend of me.

64750.「勘違いすんなよ。こないだ助けてもらった\n 借りを 返しておきたかっただけだ。:
Don't get the wrong idea... I was just
repaying the favor for you saving my life.
Don't just stand thereーyou need to leave!

64751.「<pc>さん。\n ひとまず アラハギーロを出ましょう。\n 私たち 先に行っ:
We should get out of Al-Ahagiro for a while.
We'll go on ahead.

64753.「さっきは おどろいたね。\n いきなりの 黒幕登場だなんて……。:
What a shock that was from earlier...
The mastermind behind this whole thing
just shows up out of nowhere...

64754.「申し訳ありませんでした。\n 私が 父を説得できればよかったのですが……。:
I apologize. I had hoped that I could persuade
my father to stop...

64755.「しょうがないよ！ あのヒョッヒョマンに\n 実験とか言って 操られてたみたいだ:
It's not your fault! That nyeh-heh guy seemed
to be controlling him... What did he say?
Some kind of experiment?

64756.「次は ゴリウスさんをパワーアップさせて\n <pc>さんを 倒す……って\n:
Then he said he'd make Gorious stronger
to take down <pc>...

64757.「このままだと <pc>さんも\n この国の人たちも 危険だわ……。:
If we don't do something, then both
<pc> and the town will be in
trouble...

64758.「でも 剣も 呪文も効かない\n ゴリウスさんの怨霊を相手に\n どうやって 戦:
But how are we supposed to fight against
that spirit? Swords and spells don't work on
him...

64759.「セラフィさん！ 私も協力しますから\n 一緒に 方法を探しましょう！:
I will lend you my aid as well! Let's find a
way to stop him together!

64761.「あっ。まだ お礼を渡してなかったね。\n 一緒に タジウスさんたちの居場所を\:
Oh, right... I haven't thanked you yet.
Thanks for helping me find Tajius and the
other monsters!

64762.「じゃあ またね <pc>さん！\n 私 タジウスさんと一緒に ゴリウスさんを\:
See you later! Me and Tajius will try to
find a way to stop Gorius!

86286.「ホント！？ あっ でも……\n <pc>さん 他の人からの頼まれごとも\n い:
You will?! Oh, but...it looks like you've got
your hands full helping others right now.

86287.「私 ここで 調べものしてるから\n 用事が終わったら 来てくれる？:
I'll be here doing some research, so could you
come back here when you're free?
